title: Kalyana Lakshmi / Shaadi Mubarak
description: This Telangana Government scheme provides financial support for the marriage of girls from economically weaker families. It aims to prevent child marriages and alleviate the financial burden on BPL households during weddings.
benefits: One-time grant of ₹1,00,116

title: Mahalakshmi Scheme
description: Introduced by the Telangana Government, this initiative focuses on women's empowerment and affordable living. It provides subsidized gas cylinders and monthly financial aid to eligible women across the state.
benefits: ₹2,500 monthly and Gas Cylinder for ₹500

title: Indiramma Housing Scheme
description: This Telangana Government project aims to provide permanent housing for homeless families in both rural and urban areas. It offers financial assistance to eligible beneficiaries to construct secure and sustainable homes on their own sites.
benefits: ₹5,00,000 for house construction; ₹6,00,000 for SC/ST

title: Rythu Bharosa (2025-26 Edition)
description: A flagship agricultural initiative of the Telangana Government designed to support farmers with seasonal investment assistance. It helps farmers meet the costs of seeds, fertilizers, and other essential inputs for every crop season.
benefits: ₹12,000 per acre per year in 2 installments

title: Dalit Bandhu
description: NOTE: This Telangana Government scheme for the economic empowerment of SC families has been discontinued. It previously provided significant grants for entrepreneurship to help families achieve financial independence.
benefits: Service discontinued

title: Gruha Jyothi
description: This Telangana Government energy welfare scheme provides free electricity to domestic households to reduce their monthly utility costs. It aims to improve the quality of life for low-income families by ensuring basic energy access.
benefits: Free electricity up to 200 units monthly

title: BC 1 Lakh Scheme
description: Launched by the Telangana Government, this scheme provides self-employment grants to individuals from Backward Classes. It is designed to help traditional artisans and small business owners purchase necessary tools and equipment.
benefits: ₹1,00,000 grant for equipment and tools

title: Yuva Vikasam (Rajeev Youth Development)
description: This Telangana Government initiative focuses on the skill development and financial support of unemployed youth from various communities. It provides training and assistance to help young citizens secure jobs or start their own ventures.
benefits: ₹5,00,000 assistance + Skill training fund

title: Cheyutha Pension (2025-26)
description: A social security initiative by the Telangana Government that offers monthly pensions to vulnerable groups like the elderly and widows. It provides a steady source of income to ensure dignity and basic sustenance for senior citizens.
benefits: Monthly pension of ₹4,000

title: PM-KISAN
description: This Central Government scheme provides direct income support to landholding farmer families across India. It helps farmers manage agricultural expenses by providing regular financial transfers throughout the year.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year in three installments

title: Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY) 2026
description: A comprehensive health insurance mission by the Central Government that provides cashless medical coverage for secondary and tertiary care. It ensures that poor and vulnerable families can access hospital services without financial hardship.
benefits: ₹5,00,000 family cover + Top-up for 70+ seniors

title: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana
description: This Central Government initiative promotes the use of rooftop solar panels to provide free electricity to Indian households. It aims to reduce carbon footprints while helping citizens generate their own clean energy.
benefits: Up to 300 units of free electricity per month

title: PM Dhan-Dhaanya Krishi Yojana (PM-DDKY)
description: A targeted agricultural mission by the Central Government to improve crop yields in specific districts. It focuses on modernizing farming techniques and providing infrastructure support for better post-harvest management.
benefits: Enhanced yield support, cold storage, ₹5L KCC limit

title: PM Internship Scheme (Phase 2)
description: This Central Government program provides structured internship opportunities in top companies for India's youth. It aims to bridge the gap between education and employment by offering practical industry experience and a stipend.
benefits: ₹5,000 monthly stipend + ₹6,000 one-time grant

title: PM Vishwakarma
description: Introduced by the Central Government, this scheme provides holistic support to traditional artisans and craftspersons. It offers skill training, toolkits, and low-interest credit to preserve India's rich cultural heritage and workmanship.
benefits: Stipend, tools kit, credit support up to ₹3L

title: Rythu Bima
description: This Telangana Government group life insurance scheme provides financial security to the families of deceased farmers. It ensures that the nominee receives a lump sum amount to prevent debt and distress after the loss of a breadwinner.
benefits: ₹5,00,000 life insurance cover (entire premium paid by Govt)

title: Sheep Distribution Scheme
description: A livelihood support program by the Telangana Government for traditional shepherd communities. It provides subsidized livestock units to help families increase their income through sustainable animal husbandry.
benefits: 75% subsidy on ₹1,75,000 unit cost (20 sheep + 1 ram)

title: Chenetha Lakshmi / Weaver Welfare
description: This Telangana Government welfare scheme is dedicated to the well-being of handloom weavers and their families. It provides savings support and financial aid to preserve the handloom industry and improve the weavers' livelihoods.
benefits: Subsidy on looms, health insurance, and monthly financial assistance

title: Fee Reimbursement Scheme (RTF)
description: A major educational initiative by the Telangana Government that covers the tuition fees of students from marginalized communities. It enables meritorious students from poor families to pursue higher education and professional courses.
benefits: Full tuition fee reimbursement for SC/ST and toppers; categorized for others

title: Stree Nidhi
description: This Telangana Government micro-finance program provides easy and low-interest credit to women members of Self-Help Groups (SHGs). It empowers rural and urban women by funding their entrepreneurial activities and household needs.
benefits: Low-interest loans from ₹5,000 to ₹3,00,000 without collateral

title: Rajiv Aarogyasri (2025-26)
description: A flagship health insurance scheme of the Telangana Government providing cashless treatment for major ailments and surgeries. It allows BPL families to access quality healthcare in both government and private empanelled hospitals.
benefits: Free medical treatment up to ₹10,00,000 per family per year

title: Farm Mechanization Scheme
description: This Telangana Government initiative provides subsidies on agricultural machinery like tractors and tools to modernize farming. It aims to reduce manual labor, increase efficiency, and lower the overall cost of cultivation for farmers.
benefits: 50% subsidy for women farmers; 40% for others on tractors/tools

title: Ambedkar / Minority Overseas Vidya Nidhi
description: A Telangana Government scholarship program for meritorious students from SC, ST, BC, and Minority communities to study abroad. It provides substantial grants to cover tuition fees and travel expenses for higher education in foreign universities.
benefits: Up to ₹20,00,000 grant + airfare and visa expenses

title: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY)
description: A Central Government housing mission that aims to provide affordable 'Housing for All' in both urban and rural India. It offers financial assistance and interest subsidies for the construction and renovation of permanent houses.
benefits: Financial assistance for house construction and interest subsidy on home loans

title: Indiramma Atmiya Bharosa
description: This Telangana Government scheme provides annual financial assistance to both farmers and landless agricultural laborers. It serves as a safety net to ensure that rural workers have sufficient funds for their basic needs and farming.
benefits: ₹12,000 per year (in two installments of ₹6,000 each)

title: Vaddileni Runalu (Interest-Free Loans)
description: A Telangana Government financial support scheme that provides interest-free loans to farmers and women's Self-Help Groups. It aims to lower the cost of borrowing and encourage timely repayment of agricultural and livelihood loans.
benefits: Interest-free crop loans up to ₹1 Lakh; Interest reimbursement for SHG loans up to ₹5 Lakh

title: Drip & Sprinkler Subsidy (Micro Irrigation)
description: This Telangana Government initiative promotes water-efficient farming through subsidized micro-irrigation systems. It helps farmers conserve water, reduce electricity usage, and increase crop productivity in drought-prone areas.
benefits: 100% subsidy for SC/ST; 90% for BC; 80% for Other Caste farmers

title: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
description: A major financial inclusion program by the Central Government to provide every household with a basic bank account. It facilitates easy access to banking services, insurance, and direct government benefits for the unbanked population.
benefits: Zero balance account, ₹2L accident insurance, ₹10,000 overdraft facility

title: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
description: This Central Government scheme provides collateral-free loans to small and micro-enterprises to boost entrepreneurship. It funds small-scale businesses in various categories to help them grow and generate employment.
benefits: Collateral-free loans in Shishu, Kishor, Tarun, and Tarun Plus categories

title: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
description: A Central Government social security scheme designed to provide a guaranteed monthly pension to workers in the unorganized sector. It encourages citizens to save for their retirement and ensures financial independence in old age.
benefits: Guaranteed monthly pension from ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 after 60 years

title: Pradhan Mantri Shram Yogi Maandhan (PM-SYM)
description: A voluntary pension scheme by the Central Government for unorganized workers like street vendors and rickshaw pullers. It provides a steady monthly income during old age to workers with low monthly earnings.
benefits: Assured monthly pension of ₹3,000 after 60 years
documents: Savings Bank Account / Jan Dhan Account

title: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
description: This Central Government welfare scheme provides free LPG connections to women from BPL households to promote clean cooking. It aims to improve women's health and reduce the use of polluting fuels in rural kitchens.
benefits: Deposit-free LPG connection + First refill and hotplate free

title: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY)
description: A maternity benefit program by the Central Government that provides financial assistance to pregnant and lactating mothers. It helps compensate for wage loss and ensures proper nutrition during and after pregnancy.
benefits: ₹5,000 for 1st child; ₹6,000 for 2nd child (if girl child)

title: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana (SSY)
description: A Central Government savings scheme dedicated to the financial security and education of the girl child. It offers high interest rates and tax benefits to help parents build a corpus for their daughter's future.
benefits: High interest rate (8.2% currently) + Triple Tax Benefit (EEE)

title: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: A world-standard crop insurance scheme by the Central Government that protects farmers against yield losses due to natural disasters. It provides affordable insurance coverage to ensure financial stability for the farming community.
benefits: Insurance coverage at lower premiums (1.5% - 5%) against natural calamities

title: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: This Central Government program provides farmers with detailed reports on the nutrient status of their soil every two years. It helps farmers use the right fertilizers and improve land productivity through integrated nutrient management.
benefits: Free soil testing and recommendations for integrated nutrient management

title: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
description: A Central Government credit scheme that provides farmers with timely access to adequate and flexible bank loans. It covers the costs of cultivation, post-harvest expenses, and maintenance of farm assets.
benefits: Loans up to ₹3 Lakh at effectively 4% interest (with timely repayment)

title: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
description: This Central Government skill certification scheme aims to enable Indian youth to take up industry-relevant skill training. It provides placement support and recognized certificates to improve the employability of the workforce.
benefits: Placement support, certification, and future-ready skill training (AI, Drones, 5G)

title: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship (NMMSS)
description: A Central Government scholarship for meritorious students from economically weaker sections in government schools. It provides financial aid from class 9 to 12 to reduce dropout rates and encourage further studies.
benefits: ₹12,000 per annum for students from Class 9 to Class 12

title: PM eVIDYA
description: A digital education initiative by the Central Government that provides multi-mode access to online and on-air educational content. It ensures learning continuity through TV channels, radio, and online platforms for students and teachers.
benefits: Free access to e-content (DIKSHA), 200 Educational TV channels, and Podcasts

title: Stand Up India Scheme
description: This Central Government program facilitates bank loans for setting up new enterprises for SC, ST, and Women entrepreneurs. It focuses on promoting entrepreneurship and job creation among underrepresented sections of society.
benefits: Loan for greenfield enterprises; covers up to 75% of project cost; repayment up to 7 years

title: Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana - NRLM
description: A Central Government mission to promote sustainable livelihoods for the rural poor through women's Self-Help Groups (SHGs). It provides financial and technical support to help rural families move above the poverty line.
benefits: Revolving Fund of ₹20,000-₹30,000; collateral-free loans up to ₹20 Lakh for SHGs

title: Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana - NULM
description: This Central Government scheme focuses on reducing poverty and vulnerability for urban poor households across India. It provides skill training, self-employment support, and basic services to urban marginalized communities.
benefits: Skill training; subsidy on interest for self-employment loans; support for street vendors

title: Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana (PMGSY)
description: A Central Government infrastructure project to provide all-weather road connectivity to unconnected rural habitations. It facilitates better access to markets, education, and healthcare for remote villages.
benefits: Year-round access to markets, schools, and hospitals for the entire village

title: Pradhan Mantri Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana (PMGKAY)
description: A food security mission by the Central Government that provides free food grains to the poorest citizens through the PDS system. It aims to eliminate hunger and ensure basic nutrition during times of economic hardship.
benefits: 5 kg of free food grain per person per month (for PHH) or 35 kg per family (for AAY)

title: National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP)
description: This Central Government initiative provides financial assistance to the elderly, widows, and persons with disabilities from BPL families. It ensures a minimum level of social protection for the most vulnerable citizens.
benefits: Monthly pension (₹200 - ₹500 central share + state top-up); ₹20,000 lump sum for family bereavement

title: PM SVANidhi
description: A Central Government micro-credit facility designed to help street vendors restart their businesses with affordable working capital loans. It promotes digital transactions and credit discipline among small-scale urban vendors.
benefits: Collateral-free working capital loan up to ₹80,000 (across 3 tranches); 7% interest subsidy

title: Digital India (CSC & PM-WANI)
description: A flagship mission by the Central Government to transform the country into a digitally empowered society and knowledge economy. It provides public internet access points and digital services to bridge the urban-rural divide.
benefits: Access to 400+ G2C/B2C services via CSC; Affordable high-speed Wi-Fi at PDOs

title: Skill India Mission (DDU-GKY / PMKK)
description: An umbrella initiative by the Central Government to empower Indian youth with industry-relevant skills and vocational training. It aims to build a global-standard workforce and improve the livelihoods of millions of citizens.
benefits: Placement-linked training; Free vocational courses; Industry-recognized certificates

title: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS)
description: This Central Government program encourages employers to train apprentices by sharing a portion of the stipend cost. It provides youth with hands-on training and helps industries build a skilled talent pool.
benefits: Government provides 25% of stipend (max ₹1,500/month) directly to apprentices

title: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
description: A low-cost life insurance scheme by the Central Government that offers death coverage to Indian citizens. It provides a financial safety net for families in case of the sudden loss of a breadwinner.
benefits: Life cover of ₹2 Lakh on death due to any reason for a premium of ₹436/year

title: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
description: An affordable Central Government accident insurance scheme that provides death and disability cover. It ensures that citizens from all economic backgrounds have access to basic personal accident insurance.
benefits: ₹2 Lakh for death/total disability; ₹1 Lakh for partial disability; Premium ₹20/year

title: One Nation One Ration Card (ONORC)
description: A technology-driven Central Government initiative for the nationwide portability of public distribution benefits. It allows migrant workers and their families to access subsidized food grains from any PDS outlet in India.
benefits: Migrants can buy subsidized food anywhere in India using their home state's ration card

title: NEP 2020 Initiatives (NIPUN Bharat / PM-SHRI)
description: These Central Government programs focus on reforming India's school education system with a focus on foundational literacy. They aim to improve school infrastructure and introduce modern pedagogy for holistic student development.
benefits: Focus on FLN for Grades 1-3; Upgraded school infrastructure and digital pedagogy

title: PM CARES for Children
description: This Central Government scheme provides comprehensive support to children who lost their parents or guardians to the COVID-19 pandemic. It ensures their education, healthcare, and financial security until they reach adulthood.
benefits: ₹10 Lakh corpus at age 18; Monthly stipend; ₹5 Lakh healthcare insurance

title: PM Gati Shakti
description: A transformative Central Government master plan for multi-modal infrastructure and logistics coordination. It aims to reduce transport costs and improve the speed of project execution through integrated digital planning.
benefits: Reduced transport time; integrated planning for businesses; improved last-mile connectivity

title: e-Shram Portal
description: A Central Government initiative to create a national database of unorganized workers like construction laborers and street vendors. It facilitates the delivery of social security benefits and accidental insurance directly to the workers.
benefits: Accidental insurance (₹2 Lakh death/disability); portal acts as a single window for all welfare schemes

title: PM KUSUM Yojana
description: This Central Government scheme enables farmers to install solar pumps and set up solar power plants on their barren lands. It helps farmers secure their energy needs while providing an additional source of income from solar power.
benefits: 60% subsidy (30% Central + 30% State) on solar pumps; income from selling surplus power (up to ₹25k-65k per acre)

title: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY)
description: A flagship Central Government scheme for the sustainable and focused development of the fisheries and aquaculture sector across India. It provides financial aid for infrastructure and insurance to improve the livelihoods of fishermen.
benefits: Financial aid for building hatcheries/units; insurance for fishermen; deep-sea fishing vessel support

title: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme
description: This Central Government program provides financial incentives to manufacturing companies to boost domestic production in India. It aims to make Indian industries globally competitive and create large-scale employment opportunities.
benefits: 4% to 6% cash incentive on incremental sales; support across 14 strategic sectors

title: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
description: A centralized Central Government platform that provides a single-window solution for various student scholarship schemes. It streamlines the application and disbursement process to ensure that benefits reach deserving students.
benefits: Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) of scholarship amounts; streamlined application for 100+ schemes

title: PM Formalisation of Micro Food Processing Enterprises (PMFME)
description: This Central Government initiative provides technical and financial support for the upgradation of micro-food processing enterprises. It helps small-scale food businesses improve their quality, branding, and market access.
benefits: 35% credit-linked capital subsidy (max ₹10 Lakh); training and seed capital support for SHGs

title: National Career Service (NCS)
description: A unified platform by the Central Government providing a range of employment services like job matching and career counseling. It connects job seekers with employers and providers of training and career guidance.
benefits: Job matching; Career counseling; AI-powered resume building; Access to skill-gap analysis

title: Jal Jeevan Mission (Har Ghar Jal)
description: A major Central Government welfare project aiming to provide functional household tap connections to every rural home in India. It focuses on ensuring safe and adequate drinking water to improve public health and hygiene.
benefits: Safe and adequate drinking water (55 lpcd) at home; improved health and time savings

title: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana (PMBJP)
description: This Central Government initiative makes high-quality generic medicines available at affordable prices through special retail outlets. It significantly reduces the healthcare costs for poor and middle-class families.
benefits: Branded quality generic medicines at 50% to 90% cheaper price than market

title: National Programme for Financial Inclusion (NPFI)
description: A Central Government mission to ensure that marginalized sections of society have access to basic financial services like banking and credit. It promotes economic stability and empowers citizens through digital payment literacy.
benefits: Access to savings accounts; low-cost insurance; credit discipline; digital payment literacy

title: National SC-ST Hub Scheme
description: This Central Government initiative provides comprehensive support to entrepreneurs from SC and ST communities to compete in public procurement. It offers technical assistance and financial subsidies to boost the growth of SC-ST owned MSMEs.
benefits: 25% capital subsidy (max ₹25 Lakh) on technology; reimbursements for various fees; market access support

title: National Creche Scheme (Palna)
description: A Central Government welfare program providing daycare facilities for the children of working mothers in India. It ensures a safe environment and proper nutrition for children to support women's participation in the workforce.
benefits: Daycare from 6 months to 6 years; supplementary nutrition; health check-ups; safe environment

title: Sakhi Niwas (Working Women Hostel)
description: This Central Government initiative provides safe and affordable accommodation for working women and students in urban areas. It ensures secure housing and basic amenities to help women pursue their careers away from home.
benefits: Affordable housing; mess facilities; security; medical aid; stay for children (boys up to 12, girls up to 18)

title: National Family Benefit Scheme (NFBS)
description: A Central Government social security program that provides one-time financial assistance to BPL families on the death of a primary breadwinner. It serves as a crucial safety net to prevent families from falling into extreme poverty.
benefits: One-time payment of ₹20,000 (Central share, may vary by state)
